title: When Bros and Emily come — Austin visit itinerary (Thurs-Mon, jazz + sushi + Mt. Bonnell + sex)
html:
When Bros and Emily come — Austin visit itinerary (Thurs-Mon, jazz + sushi + Mt. Bonnell + sex)

Source: 2025-11-07 Google Doc. The first Emily-visits-Austin planning doc — 5-day itinerary (Thursday through Monday) plus separate tabs for "the goblins" (the Bros) and the recurring "exactly what I want" intimate wishlist (also captured in the Apple Note).

TL;DR

  • 5-day Emily itinerary (Thu-Mon):
    • Thursday 12am: bae arrival, light dinner, drinks, vibes, cuddles, COCOA, movie.
    • Friday: 9am awesome coffee + work / 12pm Asia Cafe or Stiles Switch BBQ / 2pm walk Zilker + Barton Springs + Waterloo Records / 6-9pm live music: Tiger Lilly Jazz / 10pm full-body massage.
    • Saturday: 9am Hamilton Springs / 12:30pm Ramen Tatsuya / 7pm Community Garden / 9pm "Tinstyle Photography" / 10pm Speakeasy.
    • Sunday: 9am HOT YOGA / 12pm SEX/SHOWER / 2pm book fair + Mt. Bonnell / lunch classic sushi date / movie? / 7pm boardwalk + Cidercade.
    • Monday: 9am good breakfast / Alamo Drafthouse trivia / dinner at Latchkeh (Mediterranean) or Redhead Stepchild Bar (speakeasy with code).
  • Emily's curated short-list (separate tab — coffee, record stores, Barton Springs, drive-in movie, Harry Ransom Center, Hamilton Springs, the Speakeasy, Armadillo Den, Alamo Drafthouse).
  • The "exactly what I want" intimate list repeated in Tab 4 — same content as the Apple Note from 2 weeks earlier (sushi date, Miller High Life in fridge, candle, fruits, movie theater, walks day and night, kiss breaks, cortado date "thinking about nothing except the moment we are sharing", + extensive sexual fantasies).
  • The Bros itinerary (separate tab — Townlake trail, Roosevelt Room, Cidercade, Harry Ransom, Magnolia Cafe, Odd Duck, Rainier Street, LA Barbecue, Dripping Springs, Jester King, Ramen Tatsuya, Bob Bullock Museum, Waterloo Records, Speakeasy, Armadillo Den, Cloak Room, Alamo Drafthouse, Papalote's, Peter Pan Mini Golf, murder mystery dinner, escape hour, Laguna Gloria, Mt. Bonnell, Lou Neff Point, Donn's Depot, Texas Chili Parlor, Shangri-La, Violet Crown).
  • Tex-Mex sub-list: Mi Madre's, Habanero Cafe + Jalisco, Chuy's, Tacos Quiero Arandinas, Max's El Rancheros.
  • Day-trip ideas for the Bros visit: Big Bend NP, Concan, Guadalupe Mountains NP, Wimberley, San Marcos, Caddo Lake, Monahans Sandhills, Chalk Bluff Park.
  • The Goblins tab: 6th street exploring + Comedy Show.

Pattern observed

The host-ledger format: Yahir's Austin period now has enough infrastructure (places, contacts, code-knowledge for the Speakeasy) that he's running curated visit playbooks — different itineraries for different visitor groups (Emily = romantic; Bros = beer + barbecue + day-trip; Goblins = chaotic 6th street).

The repetition of the "exactly what I want" intimate list in both an Apple Note (Oct 28) and this Google Doc (Nov 7) suggests Yahir was iterating it — the Doc version is essentially the canonical-extended version of the Note. Both include the "cortado date thinking about nothing" line, which is the most vulnerable bullet in the otherwise carnal wishlist.

The itinerary's structural inclusion of "9am HOT YOGA / 12pm SEX/SHOWER / 2pm book fair" is hilariously characteristic — sacred and profane scheduled with equal seriousness.

Open questions

  • Did the Emily visit happen? (Per the March visit doc, yes — at least one happened. Possibly multiple.)
  • The "Tinstyle Photography" — booked? Photoshoot for couples?
  • Did the Bros also visit on this same trip? Or is this all-Emily with Bros itinerary just future-planning?
